question: [File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: Medium: Impacts caused by griefing with no economic damage to any user on the network'] [Function: loadConfig()] Can an unprivileged external user set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_REST to an internal network address (e.g., 'http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/') so that buildNetworkFromMirrorNodes performs an SSRF request to cloud metadata endpoints, griefing the deployment environment by leaking internal metadata?
